subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! This is a fragrant flower from the garden of Thy love and a verdant, lofty tree in the meadows of Thy bounty. O Lord! [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذا ریحان حدیقه ولائک و شجره مونقه باسقه فی ریاض احسانک ای رب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @spiritual transformation, @prayer for protection, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
